title: Dopinder
content:
{{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=''Deadpool'' or ''Deadpool 2''}} {{Character |image = Dopinder.png |real name = Dopinder{{Ref|DW}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Male |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Karan Soni]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|So then, he gets out of the cab, and you would not believe it. I turn around, and what do I find?"
"AirPods."
"AirPods!|Dopinder and [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''Dopinder''' is a taxi driver and a friend of [[Wade Wilson]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Dopinder (Earth-10005 Revised)||1}} ====Wade Wilson's Birthday==== Dopinder picked up [[Wade Wilson]] in his cab and the two went on to become friends. In [[2020s/Earth-10005#2024|2024]], Dopinder was invited to Wilson's surprise birthday party at his [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]], along with Wilson's other friends. The group surprised Wilson when he returned home before all the guests began mingling with each other. Dopinder told Wilson and [[Shatterstar]] a story about finding someone's AirPods in his cab. All the guests listened to Wilson make a speech about how grateful he was to have them in his life. A few days later, they all got together again for dinner, and were joined by [[Logan]] and [[Laura]].{{Ref|DW}} ==Relationships== ===Allies=== *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Friend and Client *[[Blind Al]] *[[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] **[[Colossus|Piotr Rasputin/Colossus]] **[[Negasonic Teenage Warhead|Ellie Phimister/Negasonic Teenage Warhead]] **[[Yukio]] *[[Vanessa Carlysle]] *[[Peter Wisdom]] *[[Shatterstar|Rusty/Shatterstar]] - Friend *[[Buck]] *[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] *[[X-23|X-23/Laura]] *[[Dogpool|Mary Puppins/Dogpool]] ==Trivia== *In {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Dopinder is a taxi driver who often found himself driving [[Wade Wilson]] to his missions. Due to this, the two became good friends. He also wanted to become a contract killer after taking Deadpool’s advice to kidnap and kill his cousin, Bandhu, for stealing his fiancée, Gita. ==Behind the Scenes== *Dopinder in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by [[Karan Soni]]. *Dopinder was named after a childhood friend of [[Ryan Reynolds (actor)|Ryan Reynolds]] who died from a lightning strike.[https://www.slashfilm.com/1354773/deadpool-taxi-driver-dopinder-based-on-ryan-reynolds-childhood-friend/ Deadpool's Taxi-Driving Buddy, Dopinder, Was Based On Ryan Reynolds' Childhood Friend] ==References== {{Gallery|Dopinder/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Dopinder (Earth-10005 Revised)}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]]
